summary: Tested SKU packaging_config feature with 3 contexts (production, stock_in, stock_out). All features working correctly. Backend API returns packaging_config in SKU responses. Frontend shows 3 packaging config sections in SKU edit form. Production batch creation uses SKU's production packaging. Shipment dialog shows Packaging column with SKU's stock_in options.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added packaging_config to SKU GET/POST/PUT responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: SKU packaging_config feature fully tested. 4 packaging types exist: Carton-48, Carton-6, Crate-12, Crate-24. SKUs can have packaging_config with 3 contexts (production, stock_in, stock_out). Each context has array of packaging types with is_default flag.

features_tested.sidebar_packaging_types_under_production: PASS - Packaging Types nav item is under PRODUCTION section in sidebar
features_tested.sku_edit_3_packaging_sections: PASS - Edit SKU form shows Production, Stock In (Distributor Delivery), Stock Out (Customer Delivery) sections
features_tested.sku_add_packaging_dropdown: PASS - Each section has '+ Add packaging' dropdown
features_tested.sku_save_packaging_config: PASS - Backend API accepts and returns packaging_config
features_tested.production_batch_uses_sku_packaging: PASS - Batch creation shows SKU's production packaging options in dropdown, default auto-selected
features_tested.shipment_packaging_column: PASS - Shipment dialog shows Packaging column with SKU's stock_in options
features_tested.shipment_default_packaging: PASS - Default stock_in packaging auto-selected when SKU chosen
